title: isachne pangerangensis var. marginata
intro: Isachne pangerangensis var. marginata, also known as the Pangerang Isachne or Marginated Isachne, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Isachne pangerangensis var. marginata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or oil, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
